rows: You were born in Toledo Spain in 1831 to a Merchant family, your upbringing was fairly basic for a well to do merchant family, you inherited the family business when your father passed away and had a family and sons of your own.  Everything was going as it should in life, you were recently mada Alcalle (mayor) of Toledo when you were approached and wooed by Don Antonio y Salazar.  He offered you favors and prestige, and most telling for you, the respect of a true Hidalgo for one not of that class, a thing you craved mightily.  As the next year wound its way forward you found yourself craving more and more the good Don's attention and patronage and sought him out more and more, doing more and more for him. One night on a whim you had your coachman take you to the Don's residence unanounced, he was having a ball it appeared, a masque.  Feeling piqued that he would not have extended invite to you, the Alcalle of Toledo, you proceeded to sneak into the Masque uninvited like the lower classes. You witnessed wonders and horrors that night, too many to count for your mind to truly comprehend.  You were eventually discovered, and the Don was not pleased, but seeing the need and necessity to maintaining his hold on you, he had you held and ghouled you to his service.  You served him for four years, learning quite a bit about the world the Don traveled in.  You found that you actually liked executing tasks, the sense of accomplishment at a plan come to fruition was pleasing, and despite being raised to believe different, working hard was indeed sometimes its own reward.  After four years you were granted the embrace, and started your ascent in the mysteries and the pyramid.  You were an Apprentice of the 5th, noted for your composure, skill at dealing with mortals and what it takes to corral and direct them, as well for your martial skill.  You were approached by Lord Makiel Gutierrez September 24th 1959 with a mission. Vindo Belosaus a powerful Ventrue who had been causing major problems for Clan Tremere for at least the last 200 years had been found to have a weakness.  A way into his haven from his former servitor, Pedro Villalobos, had been granted and that very night you were to ensure that Vindo met his end.  As well Lord Makiel Gutierrez charged you with destroying his childe Marco as he had killed Lord Makiel's last mortal descendant that he had been grooming fo the embrace.  You entered the manse with the rest of the team, led faithfully past the security by Pedro and to Vindo's very chambers.  You took hisl life that night, but Marco was nowhere to be found.  Lord Makiel has not been in the business of accepting excuses and since you have only accomplished one half of your mission, he is still waiting.  You have followed leads, searched out hiding spots, been attacked by and attacked in return many a Ventrue over the years, but you have not been able till now to determine for sure where and when Marco would be. The "incident in Toledo" between the Ventrue and the Toreador has caused problems for several high level officers on both sides, and remains a thorn in Ventrue/Tremere relations as long as Marco del Juro and his story are known. Now you know, he is in LA, serving as the Primogen of Clan Ventrue, and wonder of wonders, Pedro Villalobos, the former Servitor embraced into Clan Tremere those many years ago was the one to report the location of him, and that made its way to you these months later.  You approached Lord Makiel and he granted you your transfer to Los Angeles the next night. You do not know exactly what you will find in LA, but you know you will find both Pedro and Marco.  And you have once again regained the keys to your future, for transfering outside of Lord Makiels control means you can advance in the clan again, you can be the master of your own future.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.

Pedro Villalobos (Tremere) He is the reason you got this mission all those years ago, and the reason you may have the chance to finally finish the deed. [You know each other from many years in Spain.]

Lord Makiel Gutierrez (Tremere, NPC) he has kept you on task to find Marco these many years.  He has prevented your rise in the pyramid and used you for many mission in the meantime, but if you end Marco he will reward you well.
1. Make a name for yourself in Los Angeles, you have been stymied for so long in Spain tha the possiblity of actually being allowed to advance must be seized.
